allow: PowerShell(node -e "try { const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); console.log\('? firebase-admin loaded'\); console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(admin\).slice\(0,10\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('? Error:', e.message\); }")

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); console.log\('credential:', typeof admin.credential\); console.log\('cert:', typeof admin.credential?.cert\); const cred = admin.cert; console.log\('admin.cert:', typeof cred\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); const keys = Object.keys\(admin\); const methods = keys.filter\(k => typeof admin[k] === 'function'\); console.log\('Available methods:', methods.slice\(0, 20\).join\(', '\)\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const admin = require\('firebase-admin'\); console.log\('Version:', admin.SDK_VERSION\); console.log\('App:', typeof admin.app\); const serviceAccount = require\('./serviceAccountKey.json'\); const app = admin.initializeApp\({ credential: admin.cert\(serviceAccount\), databaseURL: 'https://nearme-bd95a.firebaseio.com' }\); console.log\('App initialized:', app.name\);")
